comments.comment_text:
a) To add more details for a better overview, e.g. scope overview (only MBES & SBP), objective of the scope (seabed mobility), remob from completion of Lot 1-3 (to mention no full mob conducted, only some critical/repeated tests done, e.g. patch test, wet test, etc., as you mentioned in 3. calibration summary), etc.

[Follow-up]
b) Agreed with JOCLE here. There is no mention of Seabed Mobility/ Scour Assessment
comments.response_text: a)  It has been updated in Chapter 1.1
comments.summary_ko: 개요 보완 필요. 범위(MBES & SBP만), 목적(해저면 이동성), Lot 1-3 이후 재동원(풀 Mob 미실시) 등 상세 내용 추가.

comments.comment_text: a) Did Geoview use USBL in Lot 4 scope, if not maybe no need to show USBL parameter here?
comments.response_text: a) USBL was not used and has therefore been removed.
comments.summary_ko: Lot 4에서 USBL 미사용 시 파라미터 표시 불필요.

comments.comment_text: a) Suggest to add a column in Table 5 to clearly show what tests you've done for each equipment (MBES, SBP), as you described in the texts.
comments.response_text: a) It has been updated in Table 5.
comments.summary_ko: Table 5에 장비별(MBES, SBP) 수행 테스트 항목 컬럼 추가 제안.

comments.comment_text:
a) '…, and full-scale survey operations were conducted from 12 June to 14 July 2025.'
- Suggest not to use the wording 'full-scale', and specify the scope is only for MBES and SBP 
- 13th July 2025 should be the end date of the operation.
comments.response_text: a) It has been updated in Chapter 6 and Table 8.
comments.summary_ko: 'full-scale' 표현 지양. MBES/SBP만 해당됨 명시. 조사 종료일 7월 13일로 수정.

comments.comment_text: a) 'Numerous buoys were present within the survey area,...' - suggest to specify they're 'fishing buoys'
comments.response_text: a) It has been updated in Chapter 6.

comments.comment_text:
a) In Table 8, please edit the followings:
- 'End of Survey Operations' should be 13th July 2025
- Please also add an end date for demob (demob completion on 20th July 2025)
comments.response_text: a) It has been updated in Table 8
comments.summary_ko: Table 8 수정: 조사 종료일 7월 13일, Demob 완료일 7월 20일 추가.

comments.comment_text: a) MBES signal transmission issue, can you please add date/time when this happened?
comments.response_text: a) It has been updated in Chapter 8.3
comments.summary_ko: MBES 신호 전송 문제 발생 일시 추가 필요.

comments.comment_text:
a) 
- Can you change the title in section 8.5 to Grab Sample?
- Can you mention the background that grab sample was not requested by Client (Orsted) and Geoview used standby time to do it for better interpretation of the data?
- Will Geoview share the grab sample lab result (e.g. grain size, etc.) to Orsted when it's ready?

[Follow-up]
b) 400×328×200 - please specify units of measurement e.g. cm
comments.response_text: a) Chapter 8.5 has been updated, and the grab sample laboratory results will also be shared with Orsted.
comments.summary_ko: Section 8.5 제목 'Grab Sample'로 변경. 클라이언트 미요청 배경 설명 및 대기 시간 활용 목적 기재.

comments.comment_text: a) Suggest to add line numbers for the examples shown in the figure.
comments.response_text: a) Figure 16 has been updated, and the SBP image in Figure 17 has been replaced to improve image quality and the line name has been updated.
comments.summary_ko: Figure 예시에 라인 번호 추가 제안.

comments.comment_text: a) Does the HSE statistics in Table 10 include number from Lot1-3 operation? If yes, please add a note here.
comments.response_text: a) The HSE statistics in the table are prepared only based on the results of Lot 4.
comments.summary_ko: Table 10 HSE 통계에 Lot 1-3 수치 포함 여부 확인. 포함 시 주석 추가.

comments.comment_text:
a) 'The geophysical survey in the Lot 4 area was partially completed, …' 
- suggest to use wording 'mostly' (and we did!) 
- suggest to provide a summary paragraph/table to show the completion percentage for the planned scope and also add a map showing the line coverage (vessel trackplot)
comments.response_text: a) It has been updated in Chapter 11.
comments.summary_ko: 'partially completed' → 'mostly completed'로 변경. 완료율 요약 표/문단 추가.

comments.comment_text:
a) 'Although the vessel incident led to an early demobilization, there were no injuries reported,
and appropriate HSE measures were maintained throughout the operation.'
- suggest to add a bracket behind the 'early demobilization' (only about 5? more days for full completion of the planned scope)
- suggest to add there's also no environmental impact being caused from the vessel grounding incident
comments.response_text: a) It has been updated in Chapter 11.
comments.summary_ko: 선박 사고로 조기 철수 관련 문구에 사고 유형 괄호 부기. 부상 없음 및 HSE 조치 유지 기재.

comments.comment_text: a) Could you expand on the orientation of the survey lines in Area A? Ørsted specified the line plan, and in this area the lines were intentionally run east–west to capture the crests of mega-ripples and sand ripples. While this orientation was strategic from a geophysical perspective, it was unfavourable in relation to local fishing gear, as it was perpendicular to the gill nets. Similar line orientations were used in other Lot 4 areas, leading to operational challenges and, in some cases, the early termination of lines. Including these details would provide helpful context.
comments.response_text: a) It has been updated in Chapter 7.1
comments.summary_ko: Area A 측선 방향(동-서) 설명 확장. 메가리플 능선 포착 목적. Orsted 라인 플랜 기반.
